text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's in her classic year, I hope Gold
Ship can perform even better than ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell her as much after I wish her a happy
new year, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year to you too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A new year is here... Last year's me has been
reborn into this year's me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's kind of a miracle, don't you think? If Earth
didn't exist or if the universe didn't exist... neither
would I.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
After mulling over that mind-blowing fact, I
decided to make this year all about being
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful for the Earth and the universe. I'm
also grateful for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, I present to you my original song, "Seasons
Greetings from Frozen Winter to Newborn
Spring."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks for listening.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Do you have something special to
confess to me?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Go on. Lemme hear it. Load up that pathos
cannon and let 'er rip!
choice_data_list: Let's make a big splash in the Classics this year!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? The Classics?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I actually wanted to learn how to shred some sick
guitar this year...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Then again, learning to play classical violin would be an awesome way to flip people's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm interested! Tell me more! How do
you think I should be styling my performances?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think we're on the same page, but
anyway...
choice_data_list: Let's train you up for long-distance races!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that makes sense. Stamina's important for
extra long performances.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There are some pretty long pieces when it comes
to the classics. Some of them are longer than ten
hours.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Challenge accepted! I don't care if I gotta
perform for ten or even twenty hours—I'll play
every single note to the end!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So you're the type that respects your band
members' opinions, huh? Good on you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
After all, when bands break up, they always say
it's 'cause of "creative differences" or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's iron those differences out before
they crop up! Hit me with everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hold up... A world tour? Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The good ol' "go big or go home" spiel, huh?
Yeah, that's some blazing passion you got there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And I'm right behind you! Let's hit the studio right
now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If we're doing this, we're topping the charts all
the way!
